rules_in_play: Enter on EMA-10/EMA-21 crossover confirmed by trend
Exit when price closes below 25-period average
Structure trades around volume-profile value area (institutional zones)
Stops respect value-area boundaries, not just volatility
Skip entries when VIX > 22 (volatility too high)
Skip entries when bonds signal risk-off
Skip entries during extreme greed (>65) or extreme fear (<25)
Skip entries when long-term trend is against the setup
Skip entries when macro breadth is weak
